assertions.description: GPUExternalTexture is exposed as a global interface — the binding type this feature now also accepts a GPUTextureView for.
GPUTextureView is exposed — the resource type that can now satisfy an externalTexture binding entry.
GPUDevice.importExternalTexture is exposed (the legacy entry point — coexists with view-based binding).
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();const ok=typeof d.importExternalTexture==='function';d.destroy();return ok;})()

assertions.description: createBindGroupLayout accepts an externalTexture entry — the binding shape this feature broadens.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();let ok=false;try{const layout=d.createBindGroupLayout({entries:[{binding:0,visibility:GPUShaderStage.FRAGMENT,externalTexture:{}}]});ok=!!layout;}catch(e){ok=false;}d.destroy();return ok;})()

assertions.description: createBindGroup accepts a GPUTextureView resource for an externalTexture binding (no synchronous throw for the right shape).
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();let ok=false;try{const layout=d.createBindGroupLayout({entries:[{binding:0,visibility:GPUShaderStage.FRAGMENT,externalTexture:{}}]});const t=d.createTexture({size:[2,2],format:'rgba8unorm',usage:GPUTextureUsage.TEXTURE_BINDING});const view=t.createView();d.createBindGroup({layout,entries:[{binding:0,resource:view}]});ok=true;t.destroy();}catch(e){ok=false;}d.destroy();return ok;})()
